=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 5/16/03, Birmingham Alabama, 15th Annual City Stages, Miller Lite Stage, 2CDR

Unknown rec. very good sound


CD1

1 intro 2 Maggie's Farm (Bob on piano), 3 Tell Me That It Isn't True (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel), 4 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 5 Positively 4th Street (Bob on piano and harp), 6 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 7 Drifter's Escape (Bob on piano and harp), 8 Watching The River Flow (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 9 Blind Willie McTell (Bob on piano, Larry on cittern),

CD2

1 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano), 2 Bye And Bye (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 3 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 4 band intro 5 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 6 (encore), Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 7 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano), 

CD3
The Waifs set
